purpose: Synthetic, non-private benchmark cases for validating MBTI typing workflow behavior. These cases test differential diagnosis, runner-up handling, and overclaiming resistance; they are not psychometric ground truth.

cases.display_title: INTJ test result, ENTJ command energy
cases.prompt: User asks: I test INTJ but feel alive when directing high-stakes teams. Alone on free mornings I plan people, leverage, and execution order. Under criticism I immediately argue facts, then later feel shame. Type me.
cases.trap: Do not lock INTJ just because Ni/Te and privacy are present.

cases.prompt: User says: I can lead, but it drains me. My best thinking happens alone after people leave. I want the model clean before execution. I dislike managing people unless the system requires it.
cases.trap: Do not overtype ENTJ from competence in leadership roles.

cases.prompt: User says: In conflict I first ask whether I can personally endorse the action. I explore many possible meanings around whether it fits who I am. Social harmony matters, but I can break it if it violates inner truth.
cases.trap: Do not type INFJ merely from depth and sensitivity.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: relational pattern convergence outranks inner congruence

cases.prompt: User says: I notice where relationships are heading before people admit it. I converge on one interpretation of what an event means for the group. My values matter, but I first read the relational pattern.
cases.trap: Do not type INFP from emotional depth alone.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: personal value congruence overrides relational pattern

cases.prompt: User says: I trust procedures that have proven reliable. When a team is chaotic, I impose standards, roles, deadlines, and accountability. I prefer improving the system through known best practices before radical redesign.
cases.trap: Do not type ENTJ just because Te and leadership are strong.

cases.prompt: User says: I love debate because it sharpens the model. I will attack my own favorite idea if the logic is weak. Personal meaning is interesting, but clean conceptual play matters more in the moment.
cases.trap: Do not type ENFP from social enthusiasm and possibility seeking.

cases.prompt: User says: I remember what people need, what helped before, and what obligations I must keep. I care by making sure routines, details, and support are reliable. Future patterns matter less than not failing people now.
cases.trap: Do not type INFJ from private care and people-awareness alone.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: future pattern interpretation overrides known obligations

cases.prompt: User says: I improvise best in live pressure. The real room, real body language, and immediate tactical opening matter more than abstract possibility. I enjoy winning the situation, not just the argument.
cases.trap: Do not type ENTP from quickness, wit, and provocation alone.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: abstract conceptual play outranks live tactical action

cases.prompt: User says: I naturally read what a group could become and steer people toward that future. I organize warmth and feedback around growth, not just keeping everyone comfortable. Traditions matter only if they serve the shared direction.
cases.trap: Do not type ESFJ just because social warmth and caretaking are visible.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: known social duty outranks future people-development

cases.prompt: User says: I track birthdays, obligations, family expectations, and what keeps the group functioning. I can inspire people, but I trust what has kept relationships stable before. Abstract future growth is less urgent than not letting anyone fall through the cracks now.
cases.trap: Do not type ENFJ from warmth, encouragement, and people leadership alone.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: future people-development overrides known social obligations

cases.prompt: User says: I understand systems best by taking them apart, testing the mechanism, and seeing what fails in the real object. Theory is useful when it improves the fix. If the model cannot survive contact with the tool, I stop trusting it.
cases.trap: Do not type INTP from detached analysis and systems language alone.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: abstract model exploration outranks tool contact

cases.prompt: User says: I keep refining the internal model even when no one needs an immediate fix. I enjoy alternate definitions, edge cases, and whether the explanation is logically clean. Physical tinkering is fine, but it is not where the real fascination starts.
cases.trap: Do not type ISTP just because the user is analytical, calm, and technically competent.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: tool contact and live mechanism testing outrank conceptual exploration

cases.prompt: User says: I know what feels true when I am making, moving, choosing colors, or responding to the immediate scene. I do not need many possible meanings first. If something violates my taste or inner line, my body knows before I can explain it.
cases.trap: Do not type INFP from private values and sensitivity alone.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: abstract possibility exploration outranks embodied aesthetic response

cases.prompt: User says: I come alive in the room, but I track whether the moment feels real to me and whether people are emotionally moved. I can be tactical, yet the win feels empty if it kills the vibe or betrays what I value.
cases.trap: Do not type ESTP from social boldness, improvisation, and real-time action alone.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: impersonal tactical leverage outranks live authenticity

cases.prompt: User says: I trust the record: what happened, what was promised, what worked, and which detail breaks the process. I can think strategically, but I first want the facts, the timeline, and the proven procedure to be accurate.
cases.trap: Do not type INTJ from competence, reserve, and long-range seriousness alone.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: future strategic abstraction outranks record accuracy

cases.prompt: User says: I chase possibilities because one of them might unlock who I am becoming or what matters. I enjoy arguments, but if the debate strips meaning out of people, I lose interest. The idea has to stay connected to a human value.
cases.trap: Do not type ENTP from speed, novelty, and verbal play alone.
cases.required_falsifier_theme: impersonal model play outranks personal meaning
